package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_resource_pooling_worker_pool_without_shutdown_backpressure: Layer: Resource pooling. Flag worker pools that accept unlimited jobs without bounded queues or shutdown draining.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule583NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario583Negative(records []Rule583NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
